introSection: Oki Doki is a steel roller coaster located at Bobbejaanland in Lichtaart, Antwerp, Flemish Region, Belgium. Prior to 1 November 2004, the ride was known as Junior Coaster.
fullText: Oki Doki is a steel roller coaster located at Bobbejaanland in Lichtaart, Antwerp, Flemish Region, Belgium. Prior to 1 November 2004, the ride was known as Junior Coaster.
